data.title: SportsHero Limited Announces New Securities Issuance
data.description:
SportsHero Limited (AU:SHO) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

SportsHero Limited has announced a proposed issuance of 18 million performance rights, with the issue date set for December 13, 2024. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing the company’s capital structure and potentially boosting investor interest. The securities will be quoted on the ASX, pending approval, offering a new opportunity for market participants.

Thorney Opportunities Ltd (TOP), a listed investment company on the ASX, reported a slight dip in its November portfolio performance, while its investment strategy focuses on unlocking value in undervalued companies.
